title: scanner.scan_incremental request
description: Refresh a previous `scan_project` against the current filesystem. Returns the same `ScanResult` shape as `scan_project` plus a `delta` block describing which paths changed since the snapshot.

snapshot_token.description: Token returned by a prior `scan_project` (or another `scan_incremental`) call. Identifies the persisted snapshot to diff against.

changed_paths.description: Optional explicit set of repo-relative paths that changed since the snapshot. Falls back to filesystem mtime + presence checks when omitted.
